parents.subject: LU-19549 osd-ldiskfs: missing prototypes build fix

commit.subject: LU-19551 nodemap: deny setting default quota offset nodemap
commit.message:
LU-19551 nodemap: deny setting default quota offset nodemap

When a client is associated with a nodemap that has offsets defined,
the nodemap maps the PROJID and UID for ID 0 to the offset (depending
on the offset, it may also be squashed). Therefore, a root user of
such a nodemap can attempt to set the default quota (ID 0) but it is
actually offset.

Instead, tenant root users should get an error (EPERM) when trying to
set the default quota, so that only the "global root" user can set the
tenant nodemap. This patch implements this error case.

Signed-off-by: Marc Vef <mvef@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I4530872dad977fe1a099f4d333bb751c4ac7dc0f
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/62141
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@dilger.ca>
Reviewed-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
